title: hieracium umbellatum var. sarniense
intro: Hieracium umbellatum var. sarniense is a specific variety of hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium umbellatum var. sarniense include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. It is traditionally prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and can be used topically to treat minor cuts and scrapes.
